title: Improve HTML to TipTap migration and handle inline images
description: Update _html_to_tiptap in migration_service.py to correctly handle nested tags (like bold links), spans, divs, and download images from external URLs in descriptions.
acceptance_criteria: HTML like 'text' results in TipTap JSON with both bold and link marks
Images in HTML are downloaded to local storage and src is updated to local path
Tags like span, div, font are correctly processed (preserving text and marks)
Script and iframe tags are safely handled (stripped)
